TestCase z4Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n > 0 && t1.data != NULL) {
        double* follow_case_data = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
        if (follow_case_data != NULL) {
            memcpy(follow_case_data, t1.data, t1.n * sizeof(double));
            follow_case.data = follow_case_data;
        } else {
            // malloc failed, return original follow_case without modification
            return follow_case;
        }
    } else {
        // No elements or data is nullptr, return original follow_case
        return follow_case;
    }
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n <= 0
    if (follow_case.n <= 0 || follow_case.data == NULL) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        if (follow_case.data[i] != 0.0) {
            follow_case.data[i] /= 2.0;
        }
    }

    return follow_case;
}
